_meta.description: Maps keywords to illustration filenames in public/images/library/. The AI tags each Easy Read sentence with a keyword; the client looks up matching images here.
_meta.attribution: Starter images from easyread.demcloud.org — CC BY-SA 4.0, National Democratic Institute (NDI).
_meta.howToAdd: Drop a new image into public/images/library/ and add an entry below: "keyword": { "file": "filename.ext", "alt": "Description" }

_attribution.mulberry: Mulberry Symbols are copyright 2018 to 2026 Steve Lee and licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 2.0 UK: England & Wales License. See https://mulberrysymbols.org for details
_attribution.openmoji: OpenMoji emojis are designed by OpenMoji — the open-source emoji and icon project. License: CC BY-SA 4.0. See https://openmoji.org for details.
